utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified per the brief: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – OK. 
- travel_dates: Specific dates given (Aug 10–14, 2024). The user asked for a 5-day vacation; the package is 4 nights/5 days by dates provided—acceptable specification – OK. 
- transportation: Flight details with costs. Provided provider, ticket class/quantity, confirmation, times, and total cost (€400). Origin city not specified, but the format only requires flight details with costs; provided details are sufficient – OK. 
- accommodation: Hotel selection with costs. Provided hotel name, room details, nights, confirmation, and cost – OK. 
- activities: Selected activities with costs. Two activities listed with dates and costs – OK. 
- additional_services: Extra services with costs. Provided travel protection and cost – OK. 
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown. Provided line items and final total – OK. 
Note: The user asked also for restaurants, but restaurants are not part of the required evaluation format, so it doesn't affect counting.
